name: sux-life
description: The digital-life memory layer — a skill (no connector of its own) that turns the one sux connector into a personal memory system: capture a thought in seconds, remember a durable fact/person/decision, recall across your notes + mail + files + the web with citations, and consolidate it all into a linked knowledge graph. Git is the undo, so it writes unblocked. Rides on sux-router's single front door (/mcp) via `vault_`/`mail_` verbs; install sux-router alongside it. Skills load only where the plugin is enabled (Code/CLI/Cowork), not through the synced remote connector — see the connector-surface policy.
